title: Add /night event page (Pollinations AI Night, 16 July, Block1 Berlin)
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `public/night.html`: static, self-contained event page at pollinations.ai/night — the RSVP URL printed on the event flyer. Served as an exact asset match, so no SPA/router changes.
- Adds `public/night-flyer.jpg` (142 KB) as og:image for link previews.
- Adds `/night` to `ROUTE_META` in `worker.ts` so the SEO rewriter doesn't stamp homepage meta over the page.
- Page includes schema.org Event JSON-LD, mailto RSVP, mobile-responsive. Biome clean, rendering verified.
- Temporary page — safe to remove after the event (16 July).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Meet the hive in Berlin
gist.blurb: We're hosting Pollinations AI Night at Block1 Berlin on July 16th! Check out the new event page to grab your RSVP and join us for an evening of open-source AI and art.
gist.summary: Added a static event page at pollinations.ai/night for the July 16th Pollinations AI Night at Block1 Berlin, including RSVP links and SEO metadata.
gist.impact: Community members can now visit the /night endpoint to view the event flyer, get location details, and RSVP via email.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy nighttime outdoor gathering. Polly the bee wearing a tiny party hat or scarf, hanging out with the Monitor Robot under glowing string lights. A brick wall with a pixelated event poster. Nighttime but warm and inviting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a nighttime outdoor gathering under warm glowing string lights. The cute bee mascot wearing a tiny party hat hovers next to a chunky retro monitor robot holding a glowing event flyer. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and deep lavender night sky gradient background. Large visible pixels, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley night market vibes, emotionally warm.
